author: coordinator-1
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9): a PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder completed by ops amendment before the final-phase run; no design field is touched. The CASC-0 static-case runner was built under poc/casc-0/ (runner/casc0_runner.py implementing the frozen size x medium x verifier factorial with the anti-oracle intermediate-only verifier ERR_ORACLE_CHECK; modal/modal_casc0.py; casc0-manifest.json); then two pre-freeze passes edited poc/casc-0 bytes: (1) the ASM-1158 explicator pass upgraded the raw-kernel gloss templates to explicator-authored kernel-STYLE Option-A per-relation records (mapping verdict FAIL: 0/7 core relations kernel-record-backed -> rider weakened kernel-covered->kernel-STYLE) and (2) the schema-conformance pass redistributed the over-nested /design fields into the kot-reg-allowed locations with matching analysis field-paths. This resolves the harness_manifest placeholder to the staged-bytes manifest sha re-printed after those edits (python3 poc/casc-0/modal/modal_casc0.py --print-manifest; 12 staged files); the in-container staged-bytes assert fails closed (ERR_STAGING_MISMATCH/ERR_PIN) on any mismatch. prereg-freeze --dry-run = DRY-RUN-OK (schema + 3 corpus digests + P-6 pins reproduced); reuse-check --gate GREEN (0 blocking, 6 fresh). One-shot pin discipline: any change to poc/casc-0 bytes before the run invalidates this value and requires a pre-run correction record.
